title: Nursery Rhyme. VII. Historical
content:
[From MS. Sloane, 1489, fol. 19, written in the time of Charles I.]

        The king of France, and four thousand men,
        They drew their swords, and put them up again.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. VII. Historical", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
